title: Best CSV Splitter Tool to Split Large CSVs into Multiple Files

posts.author: Techinmay (Techinmay)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’ve been struggling with oversized CSV files for a while — every time I tried to open or process them, my system would lag, freeze, or just crash completely. I even tried splitting them manually and with random online tools, but either the formatting got messed up or the rows didn’t split properly.
Can you please suggest me any automated solutions?

posts.author: Techinmay (Techinmay)
posts.cookedHtml:
I asked this question here, but I continued my reasearch on CSV tool. So, i got to know about best software and it’s SysTools CSV Splitter Tool. It’s best according to microsoft store, but after I used this tool, it’s best from my side too. Anyone who is looking for splitting large CSV file, then I recommend you using software by SysTools.
Thankyou
